name: Standard Content Page
description: A simple content page: a heading, a body of rich text, an optional image, and a call to action. Good for documentation, policy, or informational pages.

blocks.label: Body
blocks.defaultValue: Write the main content of this page here. This text supports multiple paragraphs and is editable by non-technical staff.

name: Landing Page
description: A marketing landing page: a hero statement, a grid of feature highlights, and a closing call to action.

blocks.label: Feature Grid (one feature per line)
blocks.defaultValue:
Consistent layering | A predictable, discipline-based layer system.
Uniform sheet sets | Reviewers always know where to look.
BIM-ready | Aligns CAD conventions with modern BIM workflows.
